languages.text: Удержал{mf||а} солдат Заркова от поножовщины, воззвав к чести полка.

traits.locale_text: Удержал{mf||а} солдат Заркова от поножовщины, воззвав к чести полка.

languages.text: Stopped the knife fight among the Zarkovian troops by appealing to their regiment's honour.

languages.text: ザルコヴィアン軍の兵士たちの間で起こったナイフの乱闘を、その連隊の栄誉を訴えることで鎮めた。
languages.original_text: Stopped the knife fight among the Zarkovian troops by appealing to their regiment's honour.

traits.locale_text: ザルコヴィアン軍の兵士たちの間で起こったナイフの乱闘を、その連隊の栄誉を訴えることで鎮めた。

languages.text: 你以军团荣誉为由，制止了扎尔科夫部队之间的刀斗。
languages.original_text: Stopped the knife fight among the Zarkovian troops by appealing to their regiment's honour.

traits.locale_text: 你以军团荣誉为由，制止了扎尔科夫部队之间的刀斗。

languages.text: Zarkovlu birlikler arasındaki bıçaklı kavgayı, alaylarının onuruna seslenerek durdurdun.
languages.original_text: Stopped the knife fight among the Zarkovian troops by appealing to their regiment's honour.

traits.locale_text: Zarkovlu birlikler arasındaki bıçaklı kavgayı, alaylarının onuruna seslenerek durdurdun.

languages.text: Detuviste la reyerta entre las tropas zarkovianas apelando al honor del regimiento.
languages.original_text: Stopped the knife fight among the Zarkovian troops by appealing to their regiment's honour.

traits.locale_text: Detuviste la reyerta entre las tropas zarkovianas apelando al honor del regimiento.

languages.text: Vous avez arrêté le combat au couteau entre les troupes zarkoviennes en faisant appel à l'honneur de leur régiment.
languages.original_text: Stopped the knife fight among the Zarkovian troops by appealing to their regiment's honour.

traits.locale_text: Vous avez arrêté le combat au couteau entre les troupes zarkoviennes en faisant appel à l'honneur de leur régiment.

languages.text: Messerkampf der zarkovianischen Soldaten unterbunden, indem du an die Ehre ihres Regiments appelliert hast.
languages.original_text: Stopped the knife fight among the Zarkovian troops by appealing to their regiment's honour.

traits.locale_text: Messerkampf der zarkovianischen Soldaten unterbunden, indem du an die Ehre ihres Regiments appelliert hast.
